title: Foldable display device
abstract: Provided is a foldable display device that includes a display panel having a folding area and non-folding areas. The device includes a back plate under the display panel, a first support layer under the back plate and having an opening pattern in a portion thereof corresponding to the folding area, and an impact absorbing layer under the first support layer. The impact absorbing layer includes a first portion corresponding to the folding area and a second portion corresponding to the non-folding areas, and a modulus of the first portion is greater than a modulus of the second portion. Accordingly, even when a point impact is applied to the folding area, the point impact is converted into a surface impact, so that damage to the display panel or the touch panel by the point impact can be prevented more effectively. Consequently, impact resistance characteristics of the display device may be improved.
claims: 1. A foldable display device, comprising: a display panel including a folding area and non-folding area adjacent to the folding area, the display panel including a flexible substrate, a light emitting element disposed on the flexible substrate, and an encapsulation layer disposed on the light emitting element; a back plate disposed under the display panel; a first support layer disposed under the back plate; a first adhesive layer between the back plate and the first support layer; a second adhesive layer between the back plate and the display panel; an opening pattern included in the first support layer, the opening pattern arranged in a portion corresponding to the folding area; a cover window for protecting the display panel; a third adhesive layer between the cover window and the display panel; a touch sensor disposed on the encapsulation layer; and a foreign material compensation layer disposed on the touch sensor, wherein the foreign material compensation layer includes an organic material, wherein the display panel includes: a thin film transistor; a first planarization layer disposed on the thin film transistor; a second planarization layer sequentially stacked on the first planarization layer; a light emitting element disposed on the second planarization layer, the light emitting element including an anode, a light emitting unit, and a cathode; and an intermediate electrode disposed on the first planarization layer, the intermediate electrode coupled to the anode and the thin film transistor.
